zh.settingsPageDescription: 管理默认启动项、Agent 模式、显示偏好和调试开关。
zh.settingsConnectionBody: 连接到本机 ClaudeChrome native host。随机端口调试时在这里更新端口后重连。
zh.settingsAgentBody: Claude 和 Codex 默认使用内置聊天体验；需要本机 CLI 时可切换为终端转发。终端始终使用标准 Xterm。
zh.settingsAppearanceBody: 切换响应调试、语言和主题。设置会保存在本机面板状态中，并在重新打开侧边栏后继续生效。
zh.pluginsPageDescription: 这里是技能和插件注册页面的扩展入口。插件可在侧栏注册自己的页面，而不是堆到同一个工具栏里。
zh.pluginsPagePlaceholderBody: 当前分支会保留稳定的页面宿主；技能/插件分支可将 panel-gallery 类型页面接入这里。
zh.launchDefaultsTitle: 设置 Claude、Codex 和终端面板的默认启动选项
zh.addShellTitle: 在当前工作区中添加一个终端面板
zh.addClaudeTitle: 在当前工作区中添加一个 Claude 面板
zh.addCodexTitle: 在当前工作区中添加一个 Codex 面板
zh.closePanelTitle: 关闭当前窗口的侧边栏
zh.colorWorkspaceTitle: 更改当前工作区主题色
zh.bindCurrentTabTitle: 将此面板重新绑定到当前活动标签页
zh.settingsCustomTitle: 此面板使用了单独的 {agent} 启动设置。
zh.settingsDefaultTitle: 此面板当前继承全局 {agent} 启动设置。
zh.confirmSwitchAgent: 要切换为 {agent} 并立即重启吗？
zh.confirmRebind: 要将此面板从"{current}"改绑到"{next}"吗？
zh.errorOnlyStartupSettings: 只有 Claude 和 Codex 面板支持启动设置。
zh.confirmRestartPane: 要立即重启该{agent}面板以应用新设置吗？
zh.confirmRestartInheritedPanes: 要立即重启 {count} 个继承全局设置的面板以应用新默认值吗？
zh.errorNoActiveTabToBind: 当前没有可绑定的活动标签页。
zh.errorMaxPanesReached: 单个工作区最多只能有 {max} 个面板。
zh.errorInvalidPortInteger: 请输入 1 到 65535 之间的整数端口号。
zh.statusTabUnavailable: 当前绑定的标签页不可用
zh.captureEnabledTitle: 已开启受限响应调试，再次点击可关闭。
zh.captureDisabledTitle: 默认关闭响应调试；开启后仅捕获必要的文本响应体预览。
zh.agentModeTerminalTitle: 切换到本机 {agent} CLI 终端
zh.codexModeBuiltInTitle: 切换到内置 Codex 聊天
zh.codexModeTerminalTitle: 切换到本机 Codex CLI 终端
zh.configDefaultsDescription: 在这里配置当前工作区的默认启动 Agent，以及 Claude 与 Codex 的全局默认启动参数、工作目录和浏览器环境提示注入策略。已在运行的 Agent 面板会继续使用当前设置；新设置只会用于新启动的会话。
zh.configPaneDescription: 这里可以在面板内覆盖全局设置的启动参数、工作目录和浏览器环境提示。已在运行的面板不会被自动重启，新设置会在下次启动时生效；点击重置可恢复为继承全局默认。
zh.configWorkspaceDefaultAgentHint: 为当前工作区设置默认启动 Agent；新建工作区时会继承当前工作区的该设置，并按此类型创建首个面板。
zh.configPromptModeCustom: 默认上下文 + 自定义追加
zh.configWorkingDirPlaceholder: 留空则使用当前会话工作区
zh.configWorkingDirHint: 这里只接受绝对路径；如需使用主目录，请以 ~ 开头
zh.configWorkingDirErrorRelative: 不支持相对路径。请输入绝对路径，或使用以 ~ 开头的主目录路径。
zh.configWorkingDirChecking: 正在验证该目录是否存在并且可用...
zh.configWorkingDirErrorMissing: 该目录不存在。请输入一个已经存在的绝对路径，或使用以 ~ 开头的主目录路径。
zh.configWorkingDirErrorNotDirectory: 该路径不是目录。请输入一个已经存在的目录路径。
zh.configWorkingDirErrorUnavailable: 当前无法验证本机目录。请先连接到 ClaudeChrome host 后再保存该路径。
zh.configShellWorkingDirHint: 终端面板的新会话默认会从这个目录启动；已在运行的终端不会被自动重启。
zh.configClaudeLaunchArgsHint: Claude 面板的默认 CLI 启动参数
zh.configCodexLaunchArgsHint: Codex 面板的默认 CLI 启动参数
zh.configCodexApiBaseUrlHint: 仅用于内置聊天模式；留空则继承 host 环境变量、~/.codex/config.toml 或 OpenAI 默认地址。
zh.configCodexApiKeyHint: 仅用于内置聊天模式；留空则继承 host 环境变量或 ~/.codex/auth.json，本机 CLI 模式仍使用用户自己的 CLI 配置。
zh.configCodexModelHint: 仅用于内置聊天模式；留空则继承 CLAUDECHROME_CODEX_MODEL、~/.codex/config.toml、OPENAI_MODEL 或内置默认值。
zh.configClaudePromptHint: 默认会注入 ClaudeChrome 的浏览器绑定信息；自定义模式会在其后追加你的提示
zh.configCodexPromptHint: Codex 没有独立的 system prompt 参数，ClaudeChrome 会把该上下文作为启动时的首条上下文指令传入
zh.configCustomPromptPlaceholder: 输入需要追加到默认浏览器上下文后的额外提示...
zh.configClaudePromptDisabledTransport: Claude 不会追加任何 ClaudeChrome 浏览器环境系统提示。
zh.configCodexPromptDisabledTransport: Codex 不会注入任何 ClaudeChrome 启动上下文。
zh.configPromptInjectionDisabled: 已禁用浏览器环境提示注入。
zh.configClaudePromptTransport: Claude 会通过 --append-system-prompt 注入以下浏览器环境提示。
zh.configCodexPromptTransport: Codex CLI 没有独立的 system prompt 参数，ClaudeChrome 会把以下内容作为启动时的首条上下文指令传入。
zh.configDefaultsSavedStatus: 默认启动设置已保存。已在运行的 Agent 面板会继续使用当前设置；新设置会用于后续新启动的会话。
zh.configPaneSavedStatus: 面板启动设置已保存。当前运行中的面板不会被自动重启，新设置会在下次启动时生效。
zh.configFileSyncedStatus: 当前设置已同步到本机配置文件，后续启动或恢复时可以从本地文件恢复。

en.settingsPageDescription: Manage launch defaults, agent modes, display preferences, and debugging toggles.
en.settingsConnectionBody: Connect to the local ClaudeChrome native host. For random-port debugging, update the port here and reconnect.
en.settingsAgentBody: Claude and Codex default to the built-in chat experience; switch either one to terminal forwarding when a local CLI is required. Shell always uses a standard Xterm pane.
en.settingsAppearanceBody: Switch response debugging, language, and theme. These settings are saved in the local panel state and survive reopening the sidebar.
en.pluginsPageDescription: This is the extensible entry point for skill and plugin pages. Plugins can register their own sidebar page instead of crowding the toolbar.
en.pluginsPagePlaceholderBody: This branch keeps a stable page host; the skills/plugins branch can attach panel-gallery pages here.
en.launchDefaultsTitle: Set default launch options for Claude, Codex, and Shell panes
en.addShellTitle: Add a terminal pane to the current workspace
en.addClaudeTitle: Add a Claude pane to the current workspace
en.addCodexTitle: Add a Codex pane to the current workspace
en.closePanelTitle: Close the sidebar for the current window
en.bindCurrentTabTitle: Rebind this pane to the current active tab
en.settingsCustomTitle: This pane uses custom {agent} startup settings.
en.settingsDefaultTitle: This pane inherits global {agent} startup settings.
en.errorOnlyStartupSettings: Only Claude and Codex panes support startup settings.
en.confirmRestartPane: Restart this {agent} pane now to apply new settings?
en.confirmRestartInheritedPanes: Restart {count} panes inheriting the global defaults now to apply the new defaults?
en.errorNoActiveTabToBind: No active tab available to bind.
en.errorMaxPanesReached: A workspace can have at most {max} panes.
en.errorInvalidPortInteger: Enter an integer port between 1 and 65535.
en.captureEnabledTitle: Restricted response debugging is enabled. Click again to disable it.
en.captureDisabledTitle: Response debugging is off by default; when enabled, it only captures the required text-response previews.
en.codexModeTerminalTitle: Switch to local Codex CLI terminal
en.configDefaultsDescription: Configure the current workspace's default startup agent here, along with the global default launch args, working directories, and browser-context prompt injection strategy for Claude and Codex panes. Running agent panes keep their current settings; updates only apply to newly started sessions.
en.configPaneDescription: Override the global launch args, working directory, and browser-context prompts for this pane here. The running pane is not restarted automatically; saved changes take effect the next time it starts. Reset to inherit the global defaults again.
en.configWorkspaceDefaultAgentHint: Sets the default startup agent for the current workspace. New workspaces inherit this setting from the active workspace and use it for their first pane.
en.configWorkingDirPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the current session workspace
en.configWorkingDirHint: Only absolute paths are allowed here. Use ~ at the start to expand your home directory.
en.configWorkingDirErrorRelative: Relative paths are not supported here. Enter an absolute path or a path starting with ~.
en.configWorkingDirChecking: Checking whether this directory exists and is usable...
en.configWorkingDirErrorMissing: This directory does not exist. Enter an existing absolute path or a path starting with ~.
en.configWorkingDirErrorNotDirectory: This path is not a directory. Enter an existing directory path.
en.configWorkingDirErrorUnavailable: Local path validation is unavailable right now. Connect to the ClaudeChrome host before saving this path.
en.configShellWorkingDirHint: New shell sessions start from this directory by default. Running shell panes are not restarted automatically.
en.configClaudeLaunchArgsHint: Default CLI launch args for Claude panes
en.configCodexLaunchArgsHint: Default CLI launch args for Codex panes
en.configCodexApiBaseUrlHint: Only used by built-in chat mode. Leave empty to inherit the host environment, ~/.codex/config.toml, or the default OpenAI endpoint.
en.configCodexApiKeyHint: Only used by built-in chat mode. Leave empty to inherit the host environment or ~/.codex/auth.json. Local CLI mode still uses the user's CLI configuration.
en.configCodexModelHint: Only used by built-in chat mode. Leave empty to inherit CLAUDECHROME_CODEX_MODEL, ~/.codex/config.toml, OPENAI_MODEL, or the built-in default.
en.configClaudePromptHint: ClaudeChrome injects browser-binding context by default; custom mode appends your prompt after it
en.configCodexPromptHint: Codex has no separate system prompt flag, so ClaudeChrome sends this context as the first startup instruction
en.configCustomPromptPlaceholder: Enter extra instructions to append after the default browser context...
en.configClaudePromptDisabledTransport: Claude will not append any ClaudeChrome browser-context system prompt.
en.configCodexPromptDisabledTransport: Codex will not inject any ClaudeChrome startup context.
en.configClaudePromptTransport: Claude will inject the following browser-context prompt via --append-system-prompt.
en.configCodexPromptTransport: Codex CLI has no separate system prompt flag, so ClaudeChrome sends the following content as the first startup instruction.
en.configDefaultsSavedStatus: Default startup settings saved. Running agent panes keep their current settings; the updated defaults apply to newly started sessions.
en.configPaneSavedStatus: Pane startup settings saved. The running pane is not restarted automatically; the new settings apply the next time it starts.
en.configFileSyncedStatus: Current settings were synced to the local config file and can be restored from disk on the next launch.
